params.prompt: Photorealistic editorial interior reference photograph of a Dine. Focus tightly on: dining table, pendant light above the dining area, dining chairs, rectangular smoked oak dining table — matte smoked oak finish (Smoked Oak #73503A), aged warm brass dome pendant — single centered over table, finish "aged warm brass" (Warm Brass #D99A48), interior white diffuser, neutral woven area rug — low-pile wool blend in warm oat, bonsai plant — small rounded ficus bonsai in unglazed ceramic pot, aged warm brass dome pendant — centered over table, bonsai plant (shared) if visible from living sightline. Styled in japandi aesthetic, warm_neutral palette, soft_ambient lighting. A measured, low-key luxury Japandi interior: deep matte walls and smoked oak joinery warmed by brass accents, natural textiles and a restrained plant presence. Spaces feel intimate and textural with layered ambient light; styling is sparse, family-ready and includes a compact standing work corner. Prioritize calm sightlines between living, dining and kitchen; keep material and color consistency across shared objects. This image is a visual consistency reference — every detail of the featured furniture and fixtures must be clearly visible and precisely rendered. No people. No visible brand logos. Sharp architectural photography. Luxury real estate staging.
